subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! Upon thee be My grace, My mercy and My loving-kindness. The absolute Will and the penetrating Decree of God - glorified be His majesty - [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی علیک فضلی و رحمتی و عنایتی اراده مطلقه و مشیت نافذه حق جل جلاله
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @praise and encouragement
